title: TikTok Channel Downloader Input
description: Input schema for the TikTok Channel Downloader actor.

username.title: TikTok Username
username.description: TikTok username to scrape (with or without the leading @).

maxVideos.title: Max Videos
maxVideos.description: Maximum number of videos to scrape from the channel.

downloadMp4.title: Download MP4
downloadMp4.description: Download and store the MP4 video file in the Apify key-value store.

downloadThumbnail.title: Download Thumbnail
downloadThumbnail.description: Download and store the thumbnail image in the Apify key-value store.

headless.title: Headless Mode
headless.description: Run Chromium in headless mode (disable for debugging).
